mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_customer WHERE del_flag = '0') AS customer_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_lead WHERE del_flag = '0') AS lead_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0') AS opportunity_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_contract WHERE del_flag = '0') AS contract_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_order WHERE del_flag = '0') AS order_count, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(contract_amount),0) FROM mk_contract WHERE del_flag = '0') AS contract_amount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(order_amount),0) FROM mk_order WHERE del_flag = '0') AS order_amount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) FROM mk_payment_plan WHERE payment_status = '1') AS payment_amount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(expected_amount),0) FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND opportunity_status = '0') AS expected_amount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND opportunity_status = '1') AS won_amount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_activity WHERE del_flag = '0') AS activity_count
SELECT lead_status AS code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM mk_lead WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY lead_status ORDER BY lead_status

SELECT o.stage_code AS code, s.stage_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, IFNULL(SUM(o.expected_amount),0) AS amount, IFNULL(SUM(o.weighted_amount),0) AS weighted_amount, s.win_rate AS win_rate FROM mk_opportunity o LEFT JOIN mk_opportunity_stage s ON o.stage_code = s.stage_code WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.opportunity_status = '0' GROUP BY o.stage_code, s.stage_name, s.win_rate ORDER BY s.sort
SELECT industry AS code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM mk_customer WHERE del_flag = '0' AND industry IS NOT NULL AND industry != '' GROUP BY industry ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT customer_level AS code, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM mk_customer WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY customer_level ORDER BY customer_level

SELECT co.user_id AS user_id, u.nick_name AS user_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.contract_id) AS contract_count, IFNULL(SUM(co.contract_amount),0) AS contract_amount FROM mk_contract co LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON co.user_id = u.user_id WHERE co.del_flag = '0' AND co.user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY co.user_id, u.nick_name ORDER BY contract_amount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(sign_date, '%Y-%m') AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt, IFNULL(SUM(contract_amount),0) AS amount FROM mk_contract WHERE del_flag = '0' AND sign_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(sign_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY dt

SELECT activity_type AS code, COUNT(*) AS cnt, IFNULL(SUM(lead_count),0) AS activity_lead_count, IFNULL(SUM(opportunity_count),0) AS opportunity_count, IFNULL(SUM(deal_amount),0) AS amount FROM mk_activity WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY activity_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT opportunity_status AS code, CASE opportunity_status WHEN '0' THEN '进行中' WHEN '1' THEN '已赢单' WHEN '2' THEN '已输单' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, IFNULL(SUM(expected_amount),0) AS amount, IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) AS won_amount FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND opportunity_status IN ('1','2') GROUP BY opportunity_status ORDER BY opportunity_status

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(expected_date, '%Y-%m') AS dt, COUNT(*) AS cnt, IFNULL(SUM(expected_amount),0) AS amount, IFNULL(SUM(weighted_amount),0) AS weighted_amount FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND opportunity_status = '0' AND expected_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(expected_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY dt

SELECT u.user_id AS user_id, u.nick_name AS user_name, u.dept_id AS dept_id, d.dept_name AS dept_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_customer WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id) AS customer_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_lead WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id) AS lead_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id) AS opportunity_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id AND opportunity_status = '1') AS won_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id AND opportunity_status = '2') AS lost_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT contract_id) FROM mk_contract WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id) AS contract_count, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) FROM mk_order WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id) AS order_count, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(contract_amount),0) FROM mk_contract WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id) AS contract_amount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(order_amount),0) FROM mk_order WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id) AS order_amount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pp.actual_amount),0) FROM mk_payment_plan pp INNER JOIN mk_contract c ON pp.contract_id = c.contract_id WHERE pp.payment_status = '1' AND c.user_id = u.user_id) AS payment_amount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = u.user_id AND opportunity_status = '1') AS won_amount FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id WHERE u.del_flag = '0' AND u.user_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM mk_customer WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM mk_lead WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM mk_opportunity WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM mk_contract WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY contract_amount DESC

SELECT t.dt, IFNULL(SUM(t.contract_count), 0) AS contract_count, IFNULL(SUM(t.contract_amount), 0) AS contract_amount, IFNULL(SUM(t.order_count), 0) AS order_count, IFNULL(SUM(t.order_amount), 0) AS order_amount, IFNULL(SUM(t.payment_amount), 0) AS payment_amount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(sign_date, '%Y-%m') AS dt, COUNT(*) AS contract_count, IFNULL(SUM(contract_amount),0) AS contract_amount, 0 AS order_count, 0 AS order_amount, 0 AS payment_amount FROM mk_contract WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = #{userId} AND sign_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(sign_date, '%Y-%m') UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS dt, 0 AS contract_count, 0 AS contract_amount, COUNT(*) AS order_count, IFNULL(SUM(order_amount),0) AS order_amount, 0 AS payment_amount FROM mk_order WHERE del_flag = '0' AND user_id = #{userId} AND create_time IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pp.actual_date, '%Y-%m') AS dt, 0 AS contract_count, 0 AS contract_amount, 0 AS order_count, 0 AS order_amount, IFNULL(SUM(pp.actual_amount),0) AS payment_amount FROM mk_payment_plan pp INNER JOIN mk_contract c ON pp.contract_id = c.contract_id WHERE pp.payment_status = '1' AND c.user_id = #{userId} AND pp.actual_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(pp.actual_date, '%Y-%m') ) t GROUP BY t.dt ORDER BY t.dt
